optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit Class Reference
Inheritance diagram for optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit:

Public Member Functions

 __init__ (self, int channel=0, board=None, sys_id_base=0x68)
 
 SetUnit (self, UnitType or int value)
 Sets the unit type of the values set to the vector pattern system.
 
UnitType GetUnit (self)
 Gets the unit type of the values set to the vector pattern system.
 
 Run (self)
 Starts vector pattern system.
 
 Stop (self)
 Stops vector pattern system.
 
 GetRunningStatus (self)
 Gets the running status of vector pattern system.
 
 SetStart (self, value)
 Sets the index of first desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (start of transition triggered by rising edge of external signal if External trigger configured)
 
 GetStart (self)
 Gets the index of first desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (start of transition triggered by rising edge of external signal if External trigger configured)
 
 SetEnd (self, value)
 Sets the Index after last desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (end of transition triggered by rising edge of external signal if External trigger configured)
 
 GetEnd (self)
 Gets the Index after last desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (end of transition triggered by rising edge of external signal if External trigger configured)
 
 SetFreqSampleSpeed (self, value)
 Sets the sample rate at which the Vector Pattern unit samples the vector in the Vector Pattern Memory.
 
 GetFreqSampleSpeed (self)
 Gets the sample rate at which the Vector Pattern unit samples the vector in the Vector Pattern Memory.
 
 GetMinFreqSampleSpeed (self)
 Gets the minimum supported sample rate.
 
 GetMaxFreqSampleSpeed (self)
 Gets the maximum supported sample rate.
 
 SetCycles (self, value)
 Sets the number of cycles to be generated.
 
 GetCycles (self)
 Gets the number of cycles to be generated.
 
 SetExternalTrigger (self, value)
 Sets external trigger mode.
 
 GetOutput (self)
 Get output of the vector pattern unit.
 
 SetStart2 (self, value)
 Sets the index of first desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (start of second part of transition triggered by falling edge of external signal)
 
 GetStart2 (self)
 Gets the index of first desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (start of second part of transition triggered by falling edge of external signal)
 
 SetEnd2 (self, value)
 Sets the index after last desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (end of second part of transition triggered by falling edge of external signal)
 
 GetEnd2 (self)
 Gets the index after last desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (end of second part of transition triggered by falling edge of external signal)
 
 SetExtTriggerGPIO (self, value)
 Turns GPIOx pin to trigger input source (GPIOx default is trigger output) and disables global external trigger SYNCx pin.
 
 GetExtTriggerGPIO (self)
 Gets the state of the GPIOx pin to trigger input source (GPIOx default is trigger output) and disables global external trigger SYNCx pin.
 
 GetIndex (self)
 Gets actual index.
 
 SetTriggerDivider (self, value)
 Sets the divider for external trigger signal (downsampling) 1 = no division; 2 = divide by 2 ...
 
 GetTriggerDivider (self)
 Gets the divider value for external trigger signal (downsampling) 1 = no division; 2 = divide by 2 ...
 
 SetTriggerOffset (self, value)
 Sets the offset of external trigger signal for synchronisation adjustment Offset can be in range 0 - (divider - 1) => important to set divider value first.
 
 GetTriggerOffset (self)
 Gets the offset of external trigger signal for synchronisation adjustment Offset can be in range 0 - (divider - 1)

Detailed Description

Input Channel Systems - Vector Pattern Unit
System ID: 0x68 through 0x6f

* Vector Pattern Unit system base ID: \b 0x68
*
* The Vector Pattern Unit system is an input stage system that can used to propagate
* arbitrary vector values set by the user as input to the \ref signalflow.
* The values must be saved in the \ref VectorPatternMemory  "Vector Pattern Memory".
* The Vector Pattern system has to be activated through the \ref SignalFlowManager.
* Unit type has to match to the configured control mode.
*
* ### Register Map:
*
* | Address    | Name                   | Default Value    | Description                                                                                                               | Type                  | Access
* | -----------|------------------------|------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------| ----------
* | 0x6[8-F]00 | Unit type              | 0                |                                                                                                                           | \ref ChannelValueType | read write
* | 0x6[8-F]01 | Run                    | false            | Turn Vector Pattern Unit on/off                                                                                           | boolean               | read write
* | 0x6[8-F]02 | Start                  | 0                | Index of first desired point in \ref VectorPatternMemory "Vector Pattern Memory" <br/> (start of transition triggered by rising edge of external signal if External trigger configured) | uint32                | read write
* | 0x6[8-F]03 | End                    | 0                | Index after last desired point in \ref VectorPatternMemory  "Vector Pattern Memory"  <br/> (end of transition triggered by rising edge of external signal if External trigger configured) | uint32                | read write
* | 0x6[8-F]04 | Sample rate            | 20000            | Sample rate at which the Vector Pattern unit samples the vector in the \ref VectorPatternMemory  "Vector Pattern Memory"  | float                 | read write
* | 0x6[8-F]05 | Minimum sampling  rate | \f$ \frac{20000}{2^{32}-1} \f$ | In Hz                                                                                                    | float                 | read only
* | 0x6[8-F]06 | Maximum sampling rate  | 20000            | In Hz                                                                                                                     | float                 | read only
* | 0x6[8-F]07 | Cycles                 | -1               | Number of cycles to be generated. Run flag is turned off after completion. Negative value corresponds to infinite looping | int32                 | read write
* | 0x6[8-F]08 | External trigger       | 0                | Vector Pattern Unit can be synchronised with external signal (0=disabled, 1=rising/falling edge, 2=rising edge trigger)   | uint32                | read write
* | 0x6[8-F]09 | Output                 | N/A     F         | Output of the vector pattern unit                                                                                         | float                 | read only
* | 0x6[8-F]0A | Start2                 | 0                | Index of first desired point in \ref VectorPatternMemory "Vector Pattern Memory" <br/> (start of second part of transition triggered by falling edge of external signal) | uint32                | read write
* | 0x6[8-F]0B | End2                   | 0                | Index after last desired point in \ref VectorPatternMemory "Vector Pattern Memory" <br/> (end of second part of transition triggered by falling edge of external signal) | uint32                | read write
* | 0x6[8-F]0C | External trigger GPIOx | false            | Turns GPIOx pin to trigger input source (GPIOx default is trigger output) and disables global external trigger SYNCx pin  | boolean               | read write
*

registers table 1:

+---------------+-------+
| Waveform Unit | Value |
+===============+=======+
| Current       | 0     |
+---------------+-------+

int channel = 0,
board = None,
sys_id_base = 0x68 )

Member Function Documentation

◆ GetCycles()

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.GetCycles ( self)

Gets the number of cycles to be generated.

Run flag is turned off after completion. Negative value corresponds to infinite looping

◆ GetEnd()

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.GetEnd ( self)

Gets the Index after last desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (end of transition triggered by rising edge of external signal if External trigger configured)

◆ GetEnd2()

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.GetEnd2 ( self)

Gets the index after last desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (end of second part of transition triggered by falling edge of external signal)

◆ GetExtTriggerGPIO()

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.GetExtTriggerGPIO ( self)

Gets the state of the GPIOx pin to trigger input source (GPIOx default is trigger output) and disables global external trigger SYNCx pin.

0 = off, 1 = on

◆ GetFreqSampleSpeed()

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.GetFreqSampleSpeed ( self)

Gets the sample rate at which the Vector Pattern unit samples the vector in the Vector Pattern Memory.

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.GetTriggerDivider ( self)

Gets the divider value for external trigger signal (downsampling) 1 = no division; 2 = divide by 2 ...

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.GetTriggerOffset ( self)

value )

Sets the Index after last desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (end of transition triggered by rising edge of external signal if External trigger configured)

value )

Sets the index after last desired point in Vector Pattern Memory (end of second part of transition triggered by falling edge of external signal)

◆ SetExternalTrigger()

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.SetExternalTrigger ( self,
value )

Sets external trigger mode.

Vector Pattern Unit can be synchronised with external signal (0=disabled, 1=rising/falling edge, 2=rising edge trigger)

◆ SetExtTriggerGPIO()

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.SetExtTriggerGPIO ( self,
value )

Turns GPIOx pin to trigger input source (GPIOx default is trigger output) and disables global external trigger SYNCx pin.

0 = off, 1 = on

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.SetTriggerDivider ( self,

Sets the divider for external trigger signal (downsampling) 1 = no division; 2 = divide by 2 ...

◆ SetTriggerOffset()

optoKummenberg.registers.InputStage.VectorPatternUnit.SetTriggerOffset ( self,
value )

Sets the offset of external trigger signal for synchronisation adjustment Offset can be in range 0 - (divider - 1) => important to set divider value first.
